mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, course_id, section_id, learned_section_count, total_section_count, progress_percent, last_learn_time, is_completed, complete_time FROM osh_user_course_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND delete_flag = 0

SELECT id, user_id, course_id, section_id, status, progress, last_position, learn_time, watch_count, is_completed, complete_time, finish_time, create_time, update_time FROM osh_user_learn_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND section_id = #{sectionId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_user_learn_progress ( user_id, course_id, section_id, status, progress, last_position, learn_time, watch_count, is_completed, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{sectionId}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{lastPosition}, #{learnTime}, 1, #{isCompleted}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE osh_user_learn_progress
status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, last_position = #{lastPosition}, learn_time = learn_time + #{learnTime},
is_completed = #{isCompleted},
complete_time = NOW(),
finish_time = NOW(),
update_time = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND section_id = #{sectionId} AND delete_flag = 0

UPDATE osh_user_learn_progress SET status = #{status},
is_completed = #{isCompleted},
complete_time = NOW(), finish_time = NOW(),
update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND section_id = #{sectionId} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE osh_user_learn_progress SET watch_count = watch_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND section_id = #{sectionId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_user_course_progress ( user_id, course_id, section_id, learned_section_count, total_section_count, progress_percent, last_learn_time, is_completed, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{sectionId}, #{learnedSectionCount}, #{totalSectionCount}, #{progressPercent}, #{lastLearnTime}, #{isCompleted}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE osh_user_course_progress
section_id = #{sectionId}, learned_section_count = #{learnedSectionCount}, progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, last_learn_time = #{lastLearnTime}, is_completed = #{isCompleted},
complete_time = #{completeTime},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE osh_user_course_progress SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
